mapper.select: SELECT id, photo_no, result_id, result_item_id, task_id, asset_id, photo_type, photo_url, thumbnail_url, file_size, watermark_time, longitude, latitude, has_watermark, remark, is_offline, sync_status, deleted, create_time, update_time FROM inspection_photo WHERE result_id = #{resultId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, photo_no, result_id, result_item_id, task_id, asset_id, photo_type, photo_url, thumbnail_url, file_size, watermark_time, longitude, latitude, has_watermark, remark, is_offline, sync_status, deleted, create_time, update_time FROM inspection_photo WHERE result_item_id = #{resultItemId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO inspection_photo (photo_no, result_id, result_item_id, task_id, asset_id, photo_type, photo_url, thumbnail_url, file_size, watermark_time, longitude, latitude, has_watermark, remark, is_offline, sync_status, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.photoNo}, #{item.resultId}, #{item.resultItemId}, #{item.taskId}, #{item.assetId}, #{item.photoType}, #{item.photoUrl}, #{item.thumbnailUrl}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.watermarkTime}, #{item.longitude}, #{item.latitude}, #{item.hasWatermark}, #{item.remark}, #{item.isOffline}, #{item.syncStatus}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime})
